title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — draft-media-receipt.json (Skill 62, U12)
description: P8-DRAFT's artifact (CWFE-MANIFEST.json: 'draft-media-receipt.json (draft clips + review receipt)'). One entry per scene: a lowest-cost draft_motion-tier clip (spec 10.2) generated with TWO-IMAGE first/last frame pinning off that scene's OWN approved P7-STILLS boundary stills (asset-ledger.json's first_frame_still/last_frame_still, spec 9.2) so a client can review motion/continuity before any final-tier spend. Never a connector -- drafts are single-scene review clips only (spec 9.2: draft motion precedes final scene/connector clips). Validated on every read/write by scripts/state_engine.py.

scene_id.description: Deterministic key: one draft entry per scene_id. A producer re-run never creates a second entry for the same scene.

input_urls.description: [first_frame_still upload URL, last_frame_still upload URL] -- order-significant two-image frame pinning (spec 12.2 / ADR-8's bytedance/seedance-1.5-pro input_urls contract), seeded from this scene's OWN approved P7-STILLS boundary stills.
